_description_1: When the contact is opened the light will be set to the defined value for "Warm\. When the contact is closed, the light will be set to the defined value for "Cold\. This function can be reversed.
_description_3: When the opening signal is detected (wide open or tilted) the alarm will be switched into the opposite status (toggle function).
_description_nolong_4: When the button is pressed, the selected MP3 file is played for the defined time.

group_description_1: If the signal lamp flashes accidentally it can be turned off with this button.
group_description_2: With a short or long button press the signal lamp of the chime will be triggered according to the selected mode.
help_brightness_active_ge_lo: The brightness value supplied by the sensor can be very high (up to 100000). For the sensor to be used in direct links, this value must be converted to a value between 0 and 255 (brightness threshold). The brightness threshold determines whether the actuator is triggered by the sensor or not. If the brightness threshold of the sensor is lower than the value entered here, the actuator is active. If it is darker, the actuator will stay inactive. The valid value range is from
help_brightness_active_lt_lo: The brightness value supplied by the sensor can be very high (up to 100000). For the sensor to be used in direct links, this Value must be converted to a value between 0 and 255 (brightness threshold). The brightness threshold determines whether the actuator is triggered by the sensor or not. If the brightness threshold of the sensor is lower than the value entered here, the actuator is active. If it is brighter, the actuator will stay inactive also after a recognized movement. The valid value range is from
help_title_winmatic: Further information regarding switch-on time (duration in status "Tilt")
helpbtnchannelconfiguration: To enable correct operation of the profile, the channel parameters of the sensor have to be configured accordingly. The settings can be adjusted here via the button 'Editing transmitter channel settings'.
helpbtnchannelconfigurationmotiondetecto: The minimum transmission interval of the sensor is set to
. All movements detected are reported every
to the actuator. The switch-on duration of the actuator should therefore always be longer than
, to ensure the correct operation of the profile.
Also, make sure that the channel parameter 'Send detected motion within transmission interval' is activated.
If the actuator is activated via another sensor or via a remote control, its switch-on duration has priority.
The switch-on duration should always be longer than the Minimum transmission interval' of the sensor.
helpbtnsenderconf: To enable correct operation of the profile, the channel parameters of the wind sensor have to be configured accordingly. The settings can be adjusted here via the button 'Editing transmitter channel settings'.
helpdecisionval: The decision value and the upper/lower threshold value are channel parameters of the transmitter and must be configured correctly to enable correct operation of the profile. The settings can be adjusted here via the button 'Editing transmitter channel settings'.
helpdecisionvalandthreshold: The decision value and the upper/lower threshold value are channel parameters of the transmitter and must be configured correctly to enable correct operation of the profile. The settings can be adjusted here via the button 'Editing transmitter channel settings'.
helpgotochannelconfiguration: The settings can be adjusted here via the button 'Sender channel settings Edit'
hint0a: Attention! The selected switch-on time of the actuator is shorter than the minimum transmission interval of
hint1a: As the next movement will be send in
hint1b: s, the actuator will switch off previously.
hint_hmip_wgc: If the device is operated with batteries, a long on time should not be chosen because the energized relay would drain the batteries very quickly.
hint_no_expert: This connection does not contain parameters that can be adjusted.
hint_no_profile: There is no profile for this connection. Please try again in expert mode.
hint_ontime_0: Attention! A switch-on time >2 min is not allowed for alarm sirens!
hint_ontime_1: In connection with an alarm siren the mode must be set to "absolut" mode as the switch-on time in mode "minimal" is not exactly defined.
hintalarminvalidvalue: Due to legal regulations, the maximum duration of the alarm may be 10 minutes. Please use the default values of the selection list.
hintkeypressignored: The heating device has been configured that it will not react to a remote control! See config parameter Manu-/Party mode prioritization
hintontime: The switch-on time of the light is defined be the garage door drive. Please refer to the manual of the drive.
hintpermanentfullrx: To make sure that the connection will be working correctly, 'Power supply: Mains voltage ' has to be activated in the channel settings.
